ai_generated_summary: Sneha Dhir is an AI/ML engineer with a focus on LLM-based agentic systems, RAG pipelines, and NLP. She has 4 production-grade end-to-end projects and a proven track record of 30-60 efficiency gains. Skilled in backend development, semantic search, and voice AI, she has reduced manual effort through intelligent automation across grading, sales, and voice domains. She has experience in Python, Java, JavaScript, C, LangGraph, LangChain, RAG, GPT-4o, LLaMA 3.3, Groq, Agentic AI, BERT, MiniLM, SBERT, Transformers, XAI, NLP, Text Classification, FastAPI, Flask, Spring Boot, REST APIs, Microservices, Pydantic, Uvicorn, JDBC, MongoDB, MySQL, Microsoft Azure, and JUnit.
